channel.title: Posts on Jorge Branch's Tech Blog
channel.description: Recent content in Posts on Jorge Branch's Tech Blog

item.title: Implementing a Promise in Scala
item.description: Introduction Frequently in concurrent programming, the problem of wanting to Frequently in concurrent programming, one may need to pass a placeholder object to another part of the application and be notified when The Scala libraries provide two related ways to deal with the computation of /** * A thread-safe container for a value that can be set by calls to `set()` * and retrieved by calls to `get()`. Any of those methods can be invoked * by any thread.
